channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [AKZOINDIA] Akzo Nobel India Ltd Changes Name to JSW Dulux Limited
item.description:
Akzo Nobel India Ltd, a company listed on the stock exchange, has changed its name to JSW Dulux Limited. The Ministry of Corporate Affairs has issued a fresh Certificate of Incorporation pursuant to the change of name, which was effective from 11th March 2026. The company is in the process of filing necessary documents to effect the change in name in the records and websites of the stock exchanges. The Memorandum of Association and Articles of Association of the company have been amended and altered to reflect the new name. The company is obligated to display the old name for a period of two years along with its new name.

  • Akzo Nobel India Ltd has changed its name to JSW Dulux Limited.
  • The Ministry of Corporate Affairs has issued a fresh Certificate of Incorporation pursuant to the change of name.
  • The company is in the process of filing necessary documents to effect the change in name in the records and websites of the stock exchanges.
  • The Memorandum of Association and Articles of Association of the company have been amended and altered to reflect the new name.
  • The company is obligated to display the old name for a period of two years along with its new name.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Akzo Nobel India Limited | Category: Business Update

item.title: [JONJUA] Promoters Harmanpreet Singh Jonjua and Ranbir Kaur Jonjua Acquire Shares in Jonjua Overseas Ltd
item.description:
In a recent disclosure, promoters Harmanpreet Singh Jonjua and Ranbir Kaur Jonjua have acquired shares in Jonjua Overseas Ltd. The acquisition was made on 11th March 2026. The total diluted share/voting capital of the company after the acquisition stands at 2,72,77,597 equity shares of Rs. 10 each.

  • Harmanpreet Singh Jonjua and Ranbir Kaur Jonjua, promoters of Jonjua Overseas Ltd, have acquired shares in the company.
  • The acquisition was made on 11th March 2026.
  • The total diluted share/voting capital of the company after the acquisition stands at 2,72,77,597 equity shares of Rs. 10 each.
  • The acquisition was made in compliance with Regulation 29 (2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • The mode of acquisition was an off-market transaction.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jonjua Overseas Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ACMESOLAR] ACME Solar Commissions Third Phase of 19 MW BESS Project in Rajasthan
item.description:
🔥 Trending

ACME Solar Holdings Limited, through its subsidiary ACME Suryodaya Private Limited, has successfully commissioned the third phase of a 19 MW / 40.50 MWh Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) project in Sanwara and Mehar Nagar, Pokhran, Jaisalmer, Rajasthan. This achievement brings the total commissioned capacity to 76 MW / 160.50 MWh out of the total 285 MW / 601.904 MWh capacity.

  • ACME Solar Holdings Limited commissions third phase of 19 MW / 40.50 MWh Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) project in Rajasthan.
  • The project is located at Village: Sanwara and Mehar Nagar, Tehsil-Pokhran, Dist: Jaisalmer, Rajasthan.
  • ACME Suryodaya Private Limited has now commissioned a total of 76 MW / 160.50 MWh out of the 285 MW / 601.904 MWh capacity.
  • Commercial operation date (COD) for the third phase is March 13, 2026.
  • ACME Solar Holdings Limited and its subsidiaries continue to expand their renewable energy portfolio.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [ASTERDM] Aster DM Healthcare Receives Overwhelmingly Positive Shareholder, Creditors Vote for Aster-QCIL Merger
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Aster DM Healthcare Limited has received a 96.68% voting approval from shareholders along with a significant majority of minority shareholders and creditors voting in favour of the proposed Scheme of Amalgamation with Quality Care India Limited (QCIL). The merger is expected to be completed in the next quarter, post receipt of remaining regulatory and statutory NCLT approvals. The combined entity, Aster DM Quality Care Ltd, will become one of India's top three hospital chains with over 10,625+ beds across the country.

  • Aster DM Healthcare receives 96.68% voting approval from shareholders for the proposed merger with Quality Care India Limited (QCIL)
  • The merger is expected to create one of India's top three hospital chains with over 10,625+ beds across the country
  • The merger is expected to be completed in the next quarter, post receipt of remaining regulatory and statutory NCLT approvals
  • The combined entity will operate 39 hospitals with 10,625+ beds, supported by over 36,307+ employees and clinicians
  • The merger is expected to expand access to high-quality healthcare and invest in clinical excellence and innovation

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aster DM Healthcare Ltd | Category: Merger

item.title: [GALACTICO] Galactico Corporate Services Ltd. Board Meeting Rescheduled to 14/03/2026
item.description:
The Board Meeting of Galactico Corporate Services Ltd., originally scheduled for 13/03/2026, has been rescheduled to 14/03/2026. The meeting will be held via video conferencing/Other Audio - Visual means (OAVM) to discuss several important matters, including the preliminary assessment of non-core business activities, review of actions taken to maintain liquid net worth, compliance with capital adequacy and net worth norms, feasibility of conducting non-SEBI regulated activities through a separate business unit, and the sale of material investment in equity shares of Seven Hills Beverages Limited. The meeting will take place at the deemed Registered office of the Company in Nashik, Mumbai.

  • Board Meeting rescheduled to 14/03/2026
  • Discussion on non-core business activities
  • Review of actions to maintain liquid net worth
  • Consideration of measures for capital adequacy and net worth norms compliance
  • Examination of conducting non-SEBI regulated activities through a separate business unit
  • Approval for sale of material investment in equity shares of Seven Hills Beverages Limited

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Galactico Corporate Services Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DALBHARAT] Tribunal Reduces Proceeds of Crime for Dalmia Cement by Approx. Rs. 700 Cr.
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Dalmia Bharat Ltd. announced that the Appellate Tribunal under the Prevention of Money Laundering Act, 2002 (PMLA) has passed a final order on March 9, 2026, partially allowing the appeal filed by their wholly owned subsidiary, Dalmia Cement (Bharat) Limited (DCBL). The order has substantially reduced the alleged Proceeds of Crime (PoC) from Rs. 793.34 Cr. to Rs. 92.52 Cr. DCBL is examining the order and will take further legal steps to assail the impugned order before an appropriate forum, as it does not agree with the findings. The land parcels of DCBL, previously attached by the Enforcement Directorate (ED), will be reduced accordingly based on the final order.

  • Appellate Tribunal under PMLA passes final order partially allowing DCBL's appeal
  • Proceeds of Crime (PoC) reduced from Rs. 793.34 Cr. to Rs. 92.52 Cr.
  • DCBL to examine the order and take further legal steps
  • Land parcels of DCBL previously attached by ED to be reduced
  • Dalmia Bharat Ltd. committed to pursuing appropriate legal remedies

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dalmia Bharat Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [UNOMINDA] UNO Minda Ltd. Challenges Penalty Imposed by Goods & Service Tax and Central Excise Office
item.description:
UNO Minda Ltd. has submitted a corrigendum to the intimation given earlier regarding a penalty imposed by the Office of the Commissioner of Goods & Service Tax and Central Excise, Salem, Tamil Nadu. The company clarifies that the tax amount involved in the case has been paid before the dispute arose. The adjudicated authority has appropriated the tax demand of INR 126,19,24,144 and imposed interest and penalty. UNO Minda Ltd. intends to contest the order based on its merits. The company does not foresee any material impact on its financial or operational activities.

  • UNO Minda Ltd. challenges the penalty imposed by the Goods & Service Tax and Central Excise Office.
  • The company has already paid the tax amount involved in the dispute before the inception of the tax dispute.
  • The adjudicated authority has appropriated the tax demand of INR 126,19,24,144 and imposed interest and penalty.
  • UNO Minda Ltd. intends to contest the order based on its merits.
  • The company does not foresee any material impact on its financial or operational activities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UNO Minda Ltd-$ | Category: Legal

item.title: [SETCO] Setco Automotive Ltd Receives Closure Direction from Gujarat Pollution Control Board for Subsidiary Unit
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Setco Automotive Ltd has received a direction from the Gujarat Pollution Control Board (GPCB) for the closure of one of the manufacturing units of its subsidiary, Setco Auto Systems Private Limited, located at Baroda-Godhra Highway, Kalol, District Panchmahal, Gujarat. The direction also includes disconnection of electricity supply (except single phase) and stoppage of alleged discharge of wastewater near the catchment area of River Goma. The direction has been issued based on observations made during an inspection conducted by officials of GPCB on 13 February 2026. The Company is currently examining the contents of the direction and evaluating appropriate legal remedies available to it under applicable laws. The Company will keep the stock exchanges informed of further developments in this matter. Setco Automotive Ltd assures its stakeholders that all its manufacturing units are operated consistently in compliance with applicable laws and follow the standards as per the prescribed norms.

  • Setco Automotive Ltd receives closure direction from Gujarat Pollution Control Board for a subsidiary unit
  • Direction includes disconnection of electricity supply and stoppage of alleged wastewater discharge
  • Direction issued based on observations made during an inspection conducted on 13 February 2026
  • Company examining the direction and evaluating legal remedies
  • Setco Automotive Ltd operates manufacturing units in compliance with applicable laws

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SETCO AUTOMOTIVE LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [JINDALSTEL] Jindal Steel Declared Preferred Bidder for Rengalaberha North-East Extension and Nuagan West Iron Ore Block in Odisha
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Jindal Steel has been declared the preferred bidder by the Government of Odisha for the Rengalaberha North-East Extension and Nuagan West Iron Ore Block in Keonjhar district. The iron ore block spans approximately 84 hectares and Jindal Steel has committed to a final price offer of 11115 per cent premium to the Government of Odisha. The block has been explored up to the G2 level and hosts estimated iron ore resources of approximately 38 million tonnes. As per Government records. Jindal Steel Limited is one of India’s foremost integrated steel producers, renowned for its scale, efficiency, and commitment to excellence.

  • Jindal Steel declared preferred bidder for Rengalaberha North-East Extension and Nuagan West Iron Ore Block in Odisha
  • Block spans approximately 84 hectares
  • Jindal Steel committed to a final price offer of 11115 per cent premium to the Government of Odisha
  • Block hosts estimated iron ore resources of approximately 38 million tonnes
  • Jindal Steel is one of India’s foremost integrated steel producers

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JINDAL STEEL & POWER LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [UNIONBANK] Union Bank of India to Discuss and Approve Issuance of Long-Term Bonds and Green/Sustainable Bonds
item.description:
A meeting of the Committee of Directors for Fund raising (Non-Capital) of Union Bank of India is scheduled for 16th March, 2026. The agenda includes the discussion and approval of the issuance of Long-Term Bonds for financing of infrastructure & affordable housing, and/or Green Bonds /Sustainable Bonds. This information is furnished in terms of Regulation 29(1)(d), 29(2) and 50(1)(d) of the SEBI (Listing Regulations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Union Bank of India to discuss and approve the issuance of Long-Term Bonds for infrastructure & affordable housing financing
  • Consideration of issuance of Green Bonds /Sustainable Bonds by Union Bank of India

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UNION BANK OF INDIA | Category: Deals
